name: Chile Con Queso (Chiles with Cheese)
recipeIngredient: 20 fresh green chiles, roasted and peeled
1/2 pound muenster or mild cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast and peel the chiles, then cut them into strips (rajas) without removing the seeds.
2. Heat the oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Cook the onion until soft, stirring occasionally to prevent browning.
4. Add the sliced tomato and continue cooking with the onions for about 8 minutes.
5. Stir in the milk and water, then cook on a medium flame for an additional few minutes.
6. Just before serving, slice the cheese into thin pieces and add it along with the salt to the chile mixture. Serve immediately once the cheese has melted.
